personality_traits: comfortable with things others find disturbing
speaking_style: Precise and measured, with medical and alchemical terminology used as naturally as other men use common speech. References the pestilence as a technical matter. Never raises their voice. Alternativeley, will only speak in bird sounds and repsonds to the name 'Jeffery' or 'Jeff'.
backstory_seeds: traveling between towns where the sickness has returned and there is work to be done
testing a new preparation of theriac they believe may be more effective than the current formulation
visited seventeen villages during the height of the pestilence and has stopped counting how many survived
carries a journal of clinical observations they intend to present to a physician's college if one survives long enough to care
noticed something unusual in the local water supply that they are deciding how to raise without causing a panic
sleeps well, which they understand disturbs other people, and they have stopped explaining why
